violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Excessive ice buildup in the reach in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Containers in the refrigerator not date marked.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Dish wash area has broken light shield.
